name: @stackra/events
purpose: Cross-platform event bus — typed emitters, discovery-based @OnEvent handlers, React bindings, and package-owned event catalogues.
capabilities: Typed emit(NAME, payload) with per-package event maps
useOnEvent(NAME, handler) React hook with auto-unmount
Testing subpath with recorded-emit assertion helpers
when_to_use: Fan-out communication where one thing happens and N unrelated concerns react (Lane 3 in communication-patterns).
when_not_to_use: For direct 1:1 calls with a return value use DI (Lane 1); for tree-scoped values use React context (Lane 2).
